creator: dglo@ssec.wisc.edu
text:
When using xemacs, any attempt to edit a Java file results in
	the error message 'File mode specification error:
	(file-error "Cannot open load file" "avltree")' in the minibuffer

	avltree.el is part of the xemacs-mule-basic-packages port, but
	there is no xemacs-basic-packages port (though that port is
	mentioned when any of the other xemacs packages are installed).

Fix: 

Add an xemacs-basic-packages port (though I don't know what
	would go in it) or add elib-1.08-pkg.tar.gz to the list in
	xemacs-prog-packages.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Start xemacs, try to edit any Java file.
